title: OpenClaw Active Memory global enable/disable mutated global config without operator.admin scope
description: The Active Memory command handler in extensions/active-memory/index.ts processes a `--global` enable/disable action by calling updateActiveMemoryGlobalEnabledInConfig() and persisting the result through api.runtime.config.replaceConfigFile(), which writes the Gateway's global configuration file. In the vulnerable release this global-mutation branch performs no scope check, so any Gateway caller able to reach the command with operator.write access could toggle the global Active Memory configuration without holding operator.admin, applying a configuration change beyond the intended write scope.
